segments.text: If no one else has anything to add then we should be done.
segments.speaker: GOR

segments.text: Do we want to write down something for Abbas to know or this should be enough?
segments.speaker: GOR
LUKAS
segments.text: Yeah, we can just ask if he wants clarification.

segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: He might be, I think he's still working on the things he sent to, like some of them.

segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: So he probably has stuff he can do.

segments.speaker: KALLE
segments.text: And we can tell him about the removing branches also.
